title: erepsia mutabilis
intro: Erepsia mutabilis, also known as the changing rockery, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Erepsia mutabilis include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Erepsia mutabilis is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used as a powder or added to topical creams for its medicinal benefits.
